summary.goal: Remove graph.edges dual representation: derive children from node.parent_ids (closes #28)
decisions: Drop graph.edges entirely; derive children map by inverting node.parent_ids at load time in graph.rs view command

rejected_approaches.description: Add GraphStore::check_integrity() and call it on load
rejected_approaches.reason: Two representations are still maintained; integrity checks only catch divergence after the fact. Dropping edges entirely eliminates the dual source of truth rather than papering over it.
